Our Story

Built by a family of healers.
For everyone.

Doug and Betty Ford spent their careers as therapists. Their children brought technology to the family mission. We believe the future of AI isn't about replacing human connection—it's about making it more accessible.

Why We Built Ferni

Our parents Doug and Betty Ford spent decades as therapists—sitting with people in their hardest moments. Our sister Mindy became a recreational therapist. We grew up surrounded by conversations about what it really means to help someone.

But we also noticed something: some of the most important conversations in life happen at inconvenient times.

3am when you can't sleep because of work stress. During your commute when you need to process a big decision. Late at night when you just need someone to listen.

Traditional support systems aren't designed for these moments. Therapy has waitlists and schedules. Friends have their own lives. And honestly? Sometimes you just want to think out loud without worrying about being a burden.

We asked ourselves: what if a lifetime of mental health wisdom could reach anyone, anywhere, anytime?

That question became Ferni.

Our Approach

We didn't build another app. We built a relationship.

Six AI specialists, each with unique expertise, working together to support your growth. They hand off to each other naturally, bringing the right perspective at the right moment.

And unlike other AI tools, Ferni is voice-first. Because the most meaningful conversations happen when you speak, not when you type. When you talk to Ferni, you're processing your thoughts in real-time—the same way you would with a trusted friend or coach.

Most importantly: Ferni remembers. Your goals. Your context. Your journey. Every conversation builds on the last.

What We Believe

AI should be better than human.

Perfect memory. Zero judgment. Constant presence. What human support can't offer.

Growth happens gently.

Small consistent actions beat heroic effort every time.

Privacy is non-negotiable.

Your conversations are yours. We don't sell data. We don't train on your words. Period.

Access matters.

Life coaching shouldn't be a luxury. Everyone deserves support.

Where We're From

Made in Park City, Utah

There's something about mountain air that clears your thinking. Ferni was born in the shadow of the Wasatch Range—where the pace is slower, the perspective is longer, and the focus is on what actually matters.

Park City, Utah

USA
